SELECT account, SUM(position) GROUP BY account ORD
SELECT MONTH(date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS cnt GROUP
SELECT MIN(date) AS min_date, MAX(date) AS max_dat
SELECT account, FIRST(date) AS first_date GROUP BY
